title: GitBook Space
description: A space in GitBook is a container for documentation or knowledge base content, with configurable visibility and access settings.

id.description: The unique identifier of the space.

emoji.description: The emoji icon for the space.

visibility.description: The visibility setting of the space.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the space was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the space was last updated.

deletedAt.description: The timestamp when the space was deleted, if applicable.

app.description: URL to the space in the GitBook app.

published.description: URL to the space's published site.
